TimeTracker.title: Free Time Tracker — Log Your Work Hours Daily
TimeTracker.intro: Log your work hours daily with our free online time tracker. No sign-up required — your data is stored locally in your browser and never shared with anyone.

Stats.title: Work Hours Statistics — Weekly & Monthly Overview
Stats.intro: View your work hours by week or month, track your overtime balance, and manage your data. Everything is stored privately in your browser — no account needed.

Guide.title: How to Track Work Hours Effectively
Guide.whyMattersText: When you track your hours consistently, you always know how many overtime hours you have accumulated, can verify that your compensation matches what you have actually worked, and have accurate records for timesheets or invoicing. Whether you are an employee, freelancer, or manager, a daily work log prevents disputes and gives you a clear picture of where your time goes.
Guide.dailyLogTitle: The Simplest Method: A Daily Work Log
Guide.dailyLogText: The most effective way to track work hours is to log them immediately — at the start and end of each shift. A daily work log does not need to be complex. You need just three pieces of information: when you started, when you finished, and how long you took for breaks.
Guide.whatToRecord4: Total working hours = departure - arrival - breaks
Guide.overtimeText: Overtime hours are the hours worked beyond your contracted daily or weekly hours. For example, if your contract requires 8 hours per day and you worked 9.5 hours, you have 1.5 hours of overtime for that day. At the end of the week, sum all daily overtime values to get your weekly overtime balance.
Guide.usingTrackHourTitle: Using TrackHour to Automate Your Timesheet
Guide.usingTrackHourText: TrackHour handles all calculations automatically. Set your contracted hours once, log your arrival and departure each day, and TrackHour gives you a running overtime balance. No spreadsheet needed, no manual arithmetic — just log and go.
Guide.ctaText: Start tracking your hours for free

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: TrackHour is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your information when you use trackhour.app.
PrivacyPolicy.dataText: We do not collect any personal data on our servers. TrackHour is a fully client-side application. All your work hours data is stored exclusively in your browser's local storage (IndexedDB) and never transmitted to any server.
PrivacyPolicy.adsenseText: We display advertising through Google AdSense. Google may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to show personalized advertisements. For more information, review Google's Privacy Policy at policies.google.com/privacy. You can opt out of personalized advertising at adssettings.google.com.
PrivacyPolicy.analyticsText: We use Vercel Analytics to understand general usage patterns. This service collects anonymized, aggregated data (such as page views) and does not collect personally identifiable information.
PrivacyPolicy.cookiesText: We do not set any cookies ourselves. Third-party services (Google AdSense) may set cookies in your browser for advertising purposes.
PrivacyPolicy.rightsText: Your work data is stored locally in your browser. You can view it via your browser's developer tools, and delete it at any time by clearing this site's storage. We have no access to your data.
PrivacyPolicy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
PrivacyPolicy.contactText: For questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at: contact@trackhour.app

TermsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
TermsOfUse.acceptanceText: By accessing and using TrackHour (trackhour.app), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
TermsOfUse.descriptionText: TrackHour is a free online work hours tracking tool that operates entirely in your web browser. No account creation is required. All data is stored locally on your device.
TermsOfUse.dataText: All work hours data you enter is stored exclusively in your browser's local storage (IndexedDB). You are solely responsible for your data. We have no access to, and cannot recover, data stored in your browser.
TermsOfUse.noWarrantiesText: The service is provided as-is without warranties of any kind. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or available at all times.
TermsOfUse.liabilityText: To the maximum extent permitted by law, TrackHour shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
TermsOfUse.personalUseText: TrackHour is intended for personal and professional work hours tracking. You agree not to use the service for any unlawful purpose.
TermsOfUse.changesText: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
TermsOfUse.contactText: For questions about these Terms, contact us at: contact@trackhour.app
